summary: Planned conservative inventory classification for five unrelated open PRs. No shared canonical was selected, no security-sensitive item was routed, and no close/merge/fix action was planned because each PR still needs proof or maintainer review before any mutation.

actions.reason: No hydrated canonical exists, the PR is not shown as duplicate or superseded, and proof is still missing; keep it as an independent open PR.
This is a focused but independently scoped provider fix with no hydrated duplicate/canonical relationship; keep open for proof and maintainer review.
The PR is neither duplicate nor superseded in the hydrated artifact; retain it as an independent UI fix awaiting proof/review.
This is an independent CI/release automation PR with maintainer review and proof still required; no close or route_security action is supported by the hydrated evidence.
The PR is a substantial independent daemon availability fix with failing proof and CI; keep open rather than close, merge, or escalate the whole cluster.
